notes: Entirely scoped inside .wh40k-wrapper { ... }. wh40k-wrapper has zero usages in any .hbs, .ts, or .js file — all rules are dead. Chrome element selectors appear only as nested descendants of .wh40k-wrapper and never fire.

EMPTY — contains only comments documenting import structure and removed legacy imports. No CSS rules at all.
Effectively EMPTY — contains .wh40k-wrapper { /* comment: all mixins removed */ }. Body has no rules; comment confirms all mixins were removed previously. .wh40k-wrapper itself has 0 usages.

Has TWO scopes: (1) .wh40k-wrapper { ... } — dead, and (2) many TOP-LEVEL selectors outside .wh40k-wrapper. The top-level selectors include wh40k-char-hud-* (used in tab-skills.hbs and base-actor-sheet.ts), wh40k-effects-panel (used in active-effects-panel.hbs), wh40k-panel-details (used in movement-panel-full.hbs and combat-station-panel.hbs), wh40k-panel-toggle (used in active-modifiers-panel.hbs), wh40k-header (used in header-base.hbs). CANNOT be deleted until all these are ported to Tailwind.

CHROME preservation layer — do not delete. Contains .origin-detail-dialog { .window-content { padding: 0; ... } } which is actively used (origin-detail-dialog.ts sets classes: ['wh40k-rpg', 'origin-detail-dialog']). Also contains the @tailwind components; @tailwind utilities; directives that drive the entire Tailwind CSS emission pipeline.
